nasb.text: Now after this the Lord appointed seventy others, and sent them in pairs ahead of Him to every city and place where He Himself was going to come.

esv.text: After this the Lord appointed seventy-two others and sent them on ahead of him, two by two, into every town and place where he himself was about to go.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，主又另外指派了七十二個人，差遣他們兩個兩個地，在他前面，到他自己將要到的各城各地去。

ccb.text: 事后，主拣选了七十个门徒，差遣他们两个两个地出去，先到祂将要去的城镇村庄，

csbs.text: 这些事以后，主另外指定了七十个人，差派他们两个两个地在他前头，到他要去的各城各地去。
